idea-plugin.name: Vesper
idea-plugin.description:
Peppermint and orange flavored dark theme for JetBrains IDEs.
Port of the Vesper VSCode theme by Rauno Freiberg.
Works in IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, PhpStorm, RubyMine, GoLand, CLion, Rider, DataGrip, and other IntelliJ Platform IDEs.
idea-plugin.change-notes: • 0.0.1 Initial release. One-to-one port of Vesper from VSCode.
